pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly define and check this path.
Task description and verifier.py comments clearly state targeting Air/Sinuses.
verifier.py checks for max_hu <= -100 to ensure the air threshold is used.
verifier.py checks that the surface color channel values have b > r and b > g.
setup_invesalius.sh downloads the 0051.zip file from the official InVesalius 3 releases, extracting it into the ct_cranium directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real CT Cranium DICOM dataset (from the InVesalius 3 official 0051.zip sample). The expected output is a valid InVesalius project file at '/home/ga/Documents/airway_study.inv3'. The verifier strictly requires a segmentation mask with a maximum Hounsfield Unit of -100 or less (targeting Air/Sinuses), the generation of at least one 3D surface, and the surface color to be predominantly blue.
